scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run build:electron && cross-env VITE_DEV_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:portable: npm run build && electron-packager . InputBus --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=portable-out --ignore=^/src --ignore=^/electron --ignore=node_modules/.cache --ignore=release-portable --ignore=portable-out --ignore=release --overwrite && powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path './portable-out/InputBus-win32-x64/resources/core' | Out-Null; Copy-Item '../core/build/Release/rewsd_core.exe' './portable-out/InputBus-win32-x64/resources/core/rewsd_core.exe' -Force; Copy-Item '../profiles' './portable-out/InputBus-win32-x64/resources/core/profiles' -Recurse -Force"
